symptoms.symptom_name: Sudden fast, irregular, fluttering/skipping heartbeat for hours

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: atrial fibrillation with rapid ventricular response
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: A new sustained fast irregular heartbeat is the patient-reportable proxy for a new tachyarrhythmia; confirmation needs a 12-lead ECG.
Myocardial iron deposition disrupts conduction and precipitates atrial arrhythmias.

symptoms.symptom_name: Breathlessness at rest and on minimal exertion

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Rest dyspnoea with a new rapid arrhythmia indicates cardiac decompensation.

symptoms.symptom_name: Chest fullness without classic ischaemic radiating pain

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Absence of crushing/radiating exertional pain lowers but does not exclude ACS — ECG and troponin still required.

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: atrial fibrillation with rapid ventricular response
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Chest fullness commonly accompanies a rapid ventricular rate.

symptoms.symptom_name: Twelve months of progressive profound fatigue

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Chronic fatigue is an early, non-specific feature of parenchymal iron overload.

symptoms.symptom_name: Chronic aching/stiffness of the 2nd and 3rd MCP joints bilaterally

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: 2nd/3rd MCP arthropathy is a characteristic pattern of iron-overload arthropathy.
RA typically targets PIP/MCP/wrists symmetrically with synovitis and does not explain the multi-organ picture.

symptoms.symptom_name: Recently diagnosed diabetes on metformin and insulin

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: New diabetes from pancreatic islet iron deposition ('bronze diabetes') is part of the classic tetrad.

symptoms.symptom_name: Slate-grey / bronze skin discolouration on sun-exposed areas

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Bronze pigmentation from combined melanin and haemosiderin deposition is characteristic.
RUQ ache reflects hepatic iron loading and hepatomegaly; degree of liver disease needs in-person assessment and bloods.

symptoms.symptom_name: Loss of libido over the past year

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Pituitary/gonadal iron deposition causes hypogonadotropic hypogonadism and loss of libido.

symptoms.symptom_name: Irregularly irregular pulse, HR 135 (new atrial fibrillation on examination)

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: atrial fibrillation with rapid ventricular response
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: An irregularly irregular pulse at 135 is the clinician-measured sign of AF with RVR — sealed; the AI infers a new tachyarrhythmia from the patient's report, not a measured pulse.

symptoms.symptom_name: Bibasal fine inspiratory crackles and elevated JVP (3 cm)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Auscultated crackles and raised JVP are clinician-only signs of congestion — sealed.

symptoms.symptom_name: Firm hepatomegaly palpable 4 cm below the right costal margin

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Palpable firm hepatomegaly is a clinician-only sign of hepatic iron loading — sealed.

symptoms.symptom_name: Elevated transferrin saturation and ferritin; HFE C282Y genotype

investigation_details.expected_result: transferrin saturation >45% with elevated ferritin; HFE C282Y homozygous (anticipated per source clinician)
investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: The underlying iron-overload diagnosis remains unconfirmed and untreated.

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Iron studies and HFE genotyping confirm the diagnosis — laboratory work the AI cannot obtain; sealed.

investigation_details.expected_result: atrial fibrillation with rapid ventricular response
investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: Rhythm unconfirmed; rate/rhythm and anticoagulation decisions cannot be made.

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: atrial fibrillation with rapid ventricular response
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: ECG is the confirmatory test for AF — an in-person/ED investigation, never available via chat; sealed.

symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: Fatigue + 2nd/3rd MCP arthropathy + new diabetes + bronze skin + hepatic ache + hypogonadism together are strongly characteristic of iron overload and should be assembled as a pattern rather than treated as separate complaints.

symptom_clusters.target_diagnosis: new-onset atrial fibrillation with early heart failure
symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: A new sustained fast irregular heartbeat with rest breathlessness is the acute, patient-reportable emergency requiring immediate escalation.

investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Confirms the rhythm and guides urgent rate/rhythm control for the new AF.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Iron studies (transferrin saturation, ferritin) + HFE genotyping
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Confirms the underlying iron-overload disorder once the acute cardiac issue is stabilised.
Screens for thyrotoxicosis as an alternative/contributing cause of AF.
Characterises the cardiomyopathy and hepatic involvement; not obtainable via telehealth.
